creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sat Jan 19 03:40:02 2013
New Revision: 310635
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310635

Log:
  - The URL in pkg-descr are out-dated, so replace it with CPAN site.
  - Add LICENSE (ART10 and GPLv1)
  
  PR:		ports/175363
  Submitted by:	Po-Chien Lin <linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw>

Modified:
  head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv4Addr/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv4Addr/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv6Addr/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv6Addr/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv4Addr/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv4Addr/Makefile	Sat Jan 19 03:26:00 2013	(r310634)
+++ head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv4Addr/Makefile	Sat Jan 19 03:40:02 2013	(r310635)
@@ -1,9 +1,5 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-Net-IPv4Addr
-# Date created:				25 February 2000
-# Whom:                			Brad Hendrickse <bradh@uunet.co.za>
-#
+# Created by: Brad Hendrickse <bradh@uunet.co.za>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	Net-IPv4Addr
 PORTVERSION=	0.10
@@ -14,6 +10,9 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Perl extension for manipulating IPv4 addresses
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
 MAN1=		ipv4calc.1

Modified: head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv4Addr/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv4Addr/pkg-descr	Sat Jan 19 03:26:00 2013	(r310634)
+++ head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv4Addr/pkg-descr	Sat Jan 19 03:40:02 2013	(r310635)
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@ in traditional address/netmask format an
 Methods for calculating the network and broadcast address, and
 also to check if a given address is in a specific network also exist.
 
-WWW: http://indev.insu.com/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-IPv4Addr/

Modified: head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv6Addr/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv6Addr/Makefile	Sat Jan 19 03:26:00 2013	(r310634)
+++ head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv6Addr/Makefile	Sat Jan 19 03:40:02 2013	(r310635)
@@ -1,9 +1,5 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-Net-IPv6Addr
-# Date created:				13 September 2001
-# Whom:                			JJ Behrens <jj@nttmcl.com>
-#
+# Created by: JJ Behrens <jj@nttmcl.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	Net-IPv6Addr
 PORTVERSION=	0.2
@@ -14,6 +10,9 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Perl extension for manipulating IPv6 addresses
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Net-IPv4Addr>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv4Addr \
 		p5-Math-Base85>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/p5-Math-Base85
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}

Modified: head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv6Addr/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv6Addr/pkg-descr	Sat Jan 19 03:26:00 2013	(r310634)
+++ head/net-mgmt/p5-Net-IPv6Addr/pkg-descr	Sat Jan 19 03:40:02 2013	(r310635)
@@ -4,4 +4,4 @@ described in RFC1924 are also valid.  It
 strings (as described in RFC1886) if you are inclined to play with
 DNS records.
 
-WWW: http://www.nog.net/~tony/warez/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-IPv6Addr/
_______________________________________________
